strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with Vitest, Jest, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: Limited explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin experience not evident; Java exposure appears dated
Cloud breadth shown mainly via AWS; GCP/Azure not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React foundation, solid testing discipline, and recent hands-on work in AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly aligns with internal automation needs. Database (MongoDB), Docker/Kubernetes, and cloud (AWS) experience match the stack, though Nest.js and Kotlin/Java are not clearly evidenced and would need verification.
